title: IIOS Policy Bundle
description: The MVP Policy Engine's closed, declarative rule format. See docs/22_POLICY_ENGINE_EVALUATION.md and docs/ADR/ADR-0012-POLICY-BUNDLE-FORMAT.md (Proposed). No code, scripts, or arbitrary expressions are representable in this schema — conditions use only the allowlisted operators below.

match.description: Each field is an exact string or '*' (wildcard). Exact match is more specific than '*' at evaluation time.

offline_read_allowed.description: Only meaningful for effect=allow, action_class=A rules: may this decision be served from a valid, unexpired cache when Governance itself is unreachable? Never true for B/C/D (docs/03_GOVERNANCE_SECURITY.md fail-closed rule).

reason_code.description: Optional explicit reason code this rule attaches to its decision, e.g. GOVERNANCE_MEDIATION_UNAVAILABLE for a Class C rule that is currently unexecutable (docs/21 case #14b).

field.description: Dotted path into the action item, e.g. 'constraints.amount'.

op.description: Closed allowlist. No other operator is representable — see docs/22_POLICY_ENGINE_EVALUATION.md Mandatory conditions.
